Brazier of Elemental Summoning  
 


EXPENDABLE Charges: 1
Effect: Elemental Fire (Any Slot, Casting Time: Instant) as Level 30
WT: 0.4 Size: SMALL
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Brazier of Elemental Summoning

EXPENDABLE Charges: 1
Effect: Elemental Fire (Any Slot, Casting Time: Instant) as Level 30
WT: 0.4 Size: SMALL
Class: ALL
Race: ALL

Item Type:Potion
Stackable:No
Merchant Value:2 pp 4 gp 0 sp 0 cp
Tribute:2
Lucy Entry By:Suladan
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-17 03:18:55
Page Updated:Sat Apr 15th, 2017

Expansion: Original
Average Price: 5,000pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: Uncommon
Level to Attain: 28
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Upper Guk
NPC Name
a froglok summoner


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Upper Guk


Uploaded February 24th, 2020 by nytmare
Send a correction
« Previous 1 2 Next »
Post Comment
LMAO
QuoteReply
# Aug 10 2021 at 2:23 PM Rating: Good
Xanfi
Scholar
39 posts
On Mischief server gave him a Worn Shai`din Naginata which is dirt cheap and now I have a level 12 pet hitting for 74 damage LOL. I honestly assumed there would be some kind of damage cap, but apparently not. Just bought a Tolapumj's Robe to throw on him too. So now my level 2 rogue has a buzzsaw pet to basically afk level up to ~18-20 range. Love this item.
▲ Page top
Does it stay with you?
QuoteReply
# Aug 13 2013 at 5:36 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1600647367994
7 posts
Does anyone know if this stays with you after logging, or zoning, like normal pets?
▲ Page top
Does it stay with you?
QuoteReply
# Feb 24 2020 at 2:39 PM Rating: Good
nytmare
Sage
1,344 posts
Endacer wrote:
Does anyone know if this stays with you after logging, or zoning, like normal pets?


Yes. This fire pet is the same as one cast by a level 11 Magician. It stays after zoning and logging.

But this pet is only level 12. And if you are a non-pet class, you will be lacking Companion's Discipline AA abilities such as hold, focus, and group buffs.
▲ Page top
Does it stay with you?
QuoteReply
# Aug 19 2021 at 6:38 PM Rating: Decent
ulinecro
1 post
does it share exp?
▲ Page top
Chance of drop
QuoteReply
# Jan 04 2007 at 11:04 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1668384989855
View User Forum
Scholar
18 posts
After 18+ hours camping here while cleaning house, the summoner drops this about one time in 10. Doesn't make a difference if he has cast his pet or not - he can still have it if his pet is up when you kill him.

Zopharr
▲ Page top
What the frick is a Level Repop?
QuoteReply
# Apr 02 2006 at 5:48 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592339335739
21 posts
As a monk/cleric duo in Estate of Unrest we gained about 4 lvls in an hour using this pet, until the level repopped and our pet disappeared. We are now on our way to get new brazier and try again. The wait is long and boring. PH's pop every 15 min or so, but the summoner pops only once an hour or so. He had the brazier on him every other time. Whether I killed him before or after he summoned his pet didn't seem to make any difference.
▲ Page top
RE: What the frick is a Level Repop?
QuoteReply
# Apr 02 2006 at 1:49 PM Rating: Decent
Kalysta
Scholar
1,087 posts
it's "Zone Repop" short for "repopulate"
The entire zone's npc's vanish and reset. Great for catching rare spawns in some places.

____________________________
Pain Mistress Okami L`Assundre of Tarew Marr
Dark Elf Shadow Knight
Drinal (Tarew)
Retired after 500 days /played
Deleted
http://eqplayers.station.sony.com/character_profile.vm?characterId=455266869792
Remade
http://www.magelo.com/eq_view_profile.html?num=96950
Retired again

long long long
QuoteReply
# Feb 23 2006 at 8:24 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592282287096
22 posts
Holy Smokes.. I've been camping this for a long long long long time. ( only 2nd day so far ROFL) have seen 4 Summoners Spawn and none of them have dropped this potino so far.. hehe.. And if anybody wants to read up on a good article involving this pet click here >>>

Lvl 30 to use or not?
QuoteReply
# Feb 19 2006 at 2:40 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593966493699
178 posts
Entry above says lvl to activate 30 but folks aresaying used by lvl 1 etc.

Which is it?

Sylver
▲ Page top
RE: Lvl 30 to use or not?
QuoteReply
# Feb 19 2006 at 3:32 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1661732332556
Guru
6,998 posts
You can in fact use it at level 1. I've updated the entry to reflect this.
▲ Page top
Usefull item to those under 20
QuoteReply
# Aug 30 2003 at 9:28 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591775693912
11 posts
Got this little item for my 17 twinky-dink Rogue just for kicks and to see how effective it would be. At level 17, the Elemental con'd LB and was like having a commandable 18pt DoT (Pet was hitting for an average of 18pts with a cruddy 1HB in its hand). Nuked for about 5-10 points of damage against lvl 15-18 mobs. Never played Mage or Pet class before, but I would have to gauge the pet's level at about 10-12.

I was able to solo with this guy backing me up and did lvl's 17-20 in Paludal Caverns solo in about an hour (includes bind wound time, which was about ever other combat).

A worthwhile investment for folks that like to solo in the lower levels.

▲ Page top
RE: Usefull item to those under 20
QuoteReply
# Jun 23 2005 at 7:19 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592342867392
View User Forum
Scholar
34 posts
I've used this with a 23 Rogue. Had Temp on the little fire pet so he would stay alive. Highest hit was a 26. Also, gave him a Hand of Xiblat. But it never proc'd once. However, the fire pet helped keep the mobs back turned away from me to increase my backstab skill. Nice little addition for any non-pet class. Dropped off a Froglok Summoner in Upper Guk. Spawn rate was over an hour. Spawns in the same room with the Priest. Location is 1104 -268. Be prepared for a long boring wait, and you must clear the room in order for him to spawn.
▲ Page top
RE: Usefull item to those under 20
QuoteReply
# Mar 12 2004 at 6:40 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592262131354
32 posts
I agree, I used this little item to perfection in the Qeynos Aqueducts. Those thugs and summglers never had a chance. Ring Leaders gave me a few scares, but nothing I had to run from. I finally left only to train and move to new zone.
▲ Page top
Cool Item
QuoteReply
# Jun 15 2003 at 3:42 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591789337875
108 posts
Been camping this guy for awhile now off and on ... the Braizer is a cool item that is widely overlooked. Alot of my 65 friends were stunned to find out about this item as any class / race combo can use it at level 1. This is a long camp... the summoner has alot of Place Holders. seen him about 20 tims in the ladt 2 weeks that ive been there. Ive gotten about 5 Braizers that i either give to alts / friends or sell for about 500pp hehe.

Sphiriah Sphinx
53 Cavalier
Terris-Thule
▲ Page top
cleric
QuoteReply
# Jan 06 2003 at 12:30 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592254286050
6 posts
this item would be great for a cleric from lvl one to lvl 12 or 16 depending on the pet's lvl cleric can heal and the pet can tank and it nukes and casts a ds on itself even if the ds is only 6 hp or so it will still be very good for lvling a low lvl cleric just my 2cp worth
▲ Page top
Plvl
QuoteReply
# Dec 13 2002 at 3:22 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591771523895
Scholar
16 posts
This item will allow you to plvl solo, lvls 1-8 in under an hour. With the change in pet experience, I believe you only need to do 1 point of damage to receive full xp for a kill with your pet. Either way, you should be getting close to a full yellow per kill at those lvls.
▲ Page top
Camp
QuoteReply
# Sep 23 2002 at 7:59 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591774962392
150 posts
Camped this for AGES didnt get one. The froggy mage is rare spawn and this is his rare drop. And the camp is filled with annoying boring greenies that dont die in one spell but sucks the mana out of you. Maybe il go back someday when im in the mood.
▲ Page top
RE: Camp
QuoteReply
# Dec 13 2002 at 3:16 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591771523895
Scholar
16 posts
From what I've been told, this is not a rare drop. You need to kill him before he summons a pet. If he manages to summon a pet, he will not have this item.
▲ Page top
RE: Camp
QuoteReply
# May 17 2003 at 10:15 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591759042736
34 posts
I just killed him and his pet (water pet) and he dropped the Brazier. Maybe if he has a fire pet he used the Brazier? Anyway, gonna look cool in the bazaar... "Look for the purple Dwarf with a fire pet nearby!" ;-)_

Fun fun fun
QuoteReply
# Mar 15 2002 at 1:41 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592249228374
6 posts
My cleric sat around in E Com in his nice purple armor, being guarded by his faithful fire pet.

It was hysterical.

Most people have no clue this item exists. So a Cleric with a firepet was a stunner to them. I had folks convinced this was a right click from a rare cleric shield that drops in hate. LOL

And then a mutt that knew how I had a pet showed up and spoiled the fun. Sigh.
